overall.description: Gameplay footage from Spider-Man: Miles Morales showing the character web-swinging through a snow-covered Manhattan at sunset. The character performs acrobatic aerial maneuvers between skyscrapers, briefly traverses a rooftop pool area, and continues swinging past landmarks including a gothic cathedral and waterfront harbor.

scene_state.functional_zone: high altitude corridor between Manhattan skyscrapers

events.description: character executes a steep dive between two glass skyscrapers
character swings upward sharply, silhouetted against the setting sun
rapid descent toward street level before shooting web to swing again

agents.ego_description: web-swinging at high altitude between skyscrapers, performing acrobatic flips, dives, and aerial maneuvers through the urban canyon

entered.detail: tall modern skyscraper with reflective glass facade and vertical lines
tall modern skyscraper with grid-patterned windows
building with large red facade and white decorative banners hanging vertically
suspension bridge towers visible on the horizon against the sunset
vertical orange banners with white ornament designs hanging from building facade

segments.scene_description: The character swings at high velocity between towering glass skyscrapers in a snow-covered Manhattan during golden hour. The camera follows acrobatic maneuvers including steep dives and upward arcs, with the setting sun creating dramatic backlighting and long shadows across the building facades.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury rooftop terrace with frozen swimming pool

events.description: character crashes through a window from aerial swinging onto an interior rooftop space
transitions from aerial momentum to ground running across the snowy rooftop

agents.ego_description: crashes through a window onto a snowy rooftop, runs across the roof past a frozen swimming pool and lounge furniture, then dives off the edge

entered.detail: rectangular swimming pool with blue tiles partially covered in snow and ice
light-colored stone building exterior with large windows and classical architectural details
snow-covered patio furniture arranged near the pool edge
ornate stone balustrade along the rooftop edge

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from aerial swinging to rooftop traversal by crashing through a window onto a luxury terrace. The scene features a frozen swimming pool surrounded by snow-covered lounge chairs, with the character running across the icy surface before diving back into the urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban canyon with waterfront and historic cathedral

events.description: swings past waterfront area revealing harbor and docks with boats
passes a large gothic cathedral with pointed spires and flying buttresses
rapid ascent up the tallest skyscraper in the district

agents.ego_description: web-swinging through diverse city districts at varying altitudes, passing from commercial areas to waterfront and historic zones, with occasional low passes over streets

entered.detail: large red neon sign reading 'ELLIE JUDE MOTEL' on building rooftop
body of water with docks and industrial cranes along the shoreline
historic stone church with pointed arches, flying buttresses, and snow-covered roof
very tall modern glass building with distinctive spire, tallest in the skyline
yellow tower crane visible against the skyline

segments.scene_description: The character continues web-swinging through varied urban environments, passing the Ellie Jude Motel sign, swinging low over snow-covered streets with visible traffic, then transitioning to the waterfront district with harbor views. The traversal includes a dramatic pass by a gothic cathedral and concludes with a rapid ascent up the city's tallest skyscraper as the sun continues to set.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a high-velocity journey through a snow-covered Manhattan that transitions from the heights of glass skyscrapers to the city's waterfront and finally to its highest peak. It begins with the camera tracking acrobatic dives and upward arcs between towering buildings, where the golden hour sun creates dramatic backlighting and long shadows. As the aerial momentum shifts, the character crashes through a window onto a luxury terrace, running across a frozen swimming pool and snow-covered lounge chairs before diving back into the urban canyon. The scene then expands as the camera swings low over snowy streets and past the Ellie Jude Motel sign, moving toward the waterfront district and a gothic cathedral. Finally, the trajectory shifts from the harbor views into a rapid, vertical ascent up the city's tallest skyscraper against the backdrop of the setting sun.
